tvShow.name: FROM
tvShow.overview: Unravel the mystery of a nightmarish town in middle America that traps all those who enter. As the unwilling residents fight to keep a sense of normalcy and search for a way out, they must also survive the threats of the surrounding forest – including the terrifying creatures that come out when the sun goes down.

episodes.name: Long Day's Journey Into Night
episodes.overview: The Matthews’ family road trip takes a horrifying turn when they are detoured to a small pastoral town from which they cannot leave. When their family RV crashes, Sheriff Boyd Stevens and other residents rush to save them before the sun goes down.

episodes.name: The Way Things Are Now
episodes.overview: At Colony House, Tabitha and Julie grapple with their new nightmarish reality. Out in the forest, Jim, Boyd and Kristi struggle to treat Ethan’s injuries. Tragedy strikes from an unexpected source as a new threat arises among the residents of the town.

episodes.name: Choosing Day
episodes.overview: The Matthews family must choose which of the two settlements they will join. Meanwhile, Jade comes to terms with his situation and Boyd is faced with an impossible decision that strikes at the very heart of life in the town.

episodes.name: A Rock and a Farway
episodes.overview: Julie finds comfort in her new friends. Jim and Tabitha deal with their struggling marriage. Ethan ventures off into the forest with Victor. Father Khatri urges Boyd to embrace his role as leader. Sara receives another horrifying directive.

episodes.name: Silhouettes
episodes.overview: Jim, Tabitha and Ethan begin asking questions about where they are in the hopes it may lead them home. Ellis and Fatima show Julie the lighter side of life in town. Jade struggles to make sense of their situation. Boyd seeks guidance.

episodes.name: Book 74
episodes.overview: Boyd’s plan to head off into the forest provokes an unexpected response from Kenny. Jade enlists Jim’s help with an experiment. Tabitha makes a chilling discovery that sends her down a unique path searching for answers.

episodes.name: All Good Things
episodes.overview: Father Khatri tells Boyd why he believes Sara may be useful. Jim and Tabitha find comfort in each other. Colony House celebrates the one-year anniversary of Fatima’s arrival with a party that goes terribly wrong.

episodes.name: Broken Windows, Open Doors
episodes.overview: In the wake of another death, Boyd questions his decision to leave. Kenny steps up and embraces his new role. Jim rallies the town around his idea to build a radio tower. Fatima urges Ellis to make amends with his father before it’s too late.

episodes.name: Into the Woods
episodes.overview: Boyd and Sara journey deeper into the forest than Boyd has ever gone, encountering new and terrifying mysteries. Jim’s confidence in the radio tower begins to wane. An unexpected tragedy causes Donna to unravel. Kenny and Kristi share a moment.

episodes.name: Oh, the Places We'll Go
episodes.overview: Boyd draws strength from an unlikely source. Jim’s radio tower yields consequences which rock him to his very core. The hole that Tabitha has been digging leads her somewhere, and to someone, she could never have expected.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Disoriented travelers find themselves trapped in a mysterious town with no exit, where malevolent forces toy with their minds and hunt them by night.

episodes.name: Strangers in a Strange Land
episodes.overview: In Sheriff Boyd’s absence, Donna and Kenny struggle to manage the chaos as a busload of unwitting newcomers arrives in town. Victor and Tabitha go on a chilling journey through the nightmarish labyrinth of tunnels beneath the town.

episodes.name: The Kindness of Strangers
episodes.overview: A tense night in the diner as the residents and newcomers wait for sunrise. Fear permeates the wreckage beneath the Matthews house, as Jim and Tom struggle to keep a panicked bus passenger quiet.

episodes.name: Tether
episodes.overview: Kenny and Ellis make a grisly discovery out in the forest. Boyd struggles with the reality of what’s happening to him.

episodes.name: This Way Gone
episodes.overview: As Boyd’s condition grows more alarming, Sara’s return to town puts him in a difficult position. Jim shares a troubling new theory about the town.

episodes.name: Lullaby
episodes.overview: Sara must face the music, as word of her return spreads through town. Victor and Jade strike an unlikely bargain.

episodes.name: Pas de Deux
episodes.overview: Tensions run high at Colony House when word of the coming food shortage leaks out. A night at the clinic takes a terrifying turn.

episodes.name: Belly of the Beast
episodes.overview: Boyd and Kristi seek to capitalize on the apparent death of the Nightmare Creature. Jim finds an unlikely ally in the volatile Randall.

episodes.name: Forest for the Trees
episodes.overview: In their pursuit of the truth about the town, Jim and Randall hatch a dangerous plan. Meanwhile, a new form of terror is brewing.

episodes.name: Ball of Magic Fire
episodes.overview: Panic spreads through town as the residents face a chilling new threat to their survival. Jim realizes the magnitude of the mistake he made by enlisting Randall in his cause.

episodes.name: Once Upon a Time...
episodes.overview: Boyd fears he may have finally run out of answers, as the residents of town prepare for the end. Tabitha clings to the belief that the children could be the key to their salvation.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Hidden truths about the nature and terrifying origins of the town begin to emerge, even as life for its residents is plunged into chaos by the arrival of mysterious newcomers.

episodes.name: Shatter
episodes.overview: Boyd feels the town slipping away from him as the weather grows colder and the residents more desperate.

episodes.name: When We Go
episodes.overview: Boyd struggles to find a path forward as the town bids farewell to one of their own; Fatima's health takes a turn for the worse; Tabitha finds help from an unlikely ally.

episodes.name: Mouse Trap
episodes.overview: Kenny leads a group into the forest in search of food; Donna and Ellis try to talk Boyd out of a dangerous plan; Tabitha makes a mind-bending discovery; Fatima questions the welfare of her unborn baby.

episodes.name: There and Back Again
episodes.overview: Boyd is forced to make a tough decision when newcomers arrive in town at nightfall; Victor unearths memories from the past in the hopes of finding answers.

episodes.name: The Light of Day
episodes.overview: Victor must face a painful reminder of his past; Julie looks for ways to cope with her trauma; Boyd struggles to keep the town safe as the residents begin to question his judgement; Tabitha tries to adjust to her new surroundings.

episodes.name: Scar Tissue
episodes.overview: Fatima and Ellis make a big decision about her pregnancy; Boyd fears for the future of his family; Tensions rise in the Matthews house; Randall opens up to Marielle about his fears.

episodes.name: These Fragile Lives
episodes.overview: The edges begin to fray as concerns about Fatima's pregnancy deepen; Jade follows a clue trail into the forest; Julie and Randall seek a bit of normalcy.

episodes.name: Thresholds
episodes.overview: Accusations start flying and truths come to light in the aftermath of a tragedy; Victor struggles to recover long-buried memories about the town's past; Julie and Ethan search for answers about the mysterious ruins in the woods.

episodes.name: Revelations: Chapter One
episodes.overview: Tensions are at an all time high as the residents of town learn that one of their own has gone missing.

episodes.name: Revelations: Chapter Two
episodes.overview: Boyd is pushed to his limit as time begins to run out for someone he loves; Randall is haunted by his trauma and Victor reveals a hard truth; Tabitha's unlikely journey takes a shocking turn.

seasons.name: Season 3
seasons.overview: The weather grows colder, food is scarce, and every day is more difficult than the last. Will the fight for survival force the residents of town to sacrifice the very humanity that sets them apart from the monsters they fear?

episodes.name: The Arrival
episodes.overview: A new arrival throws the town into chaos. Jade and Tabitha struggle with their revelation at the Bottle Tree. Boyd grapples with the implications of Smiley’s return.

episodes.name: Fray
episodes.overview: A gruesome discovery sends shockwaves through the town as Jade and Tabitha struggle with the weight of their revelation.

episodes.name: Merrily We Go
episodes.overview: Boyd tries to save Acosta from herself as Julie digs deeper into her newfound abilities; Tabitha embarks on a desperate gamble and Victor joins Ethan in a quest for answers.

episodes.name: Of Myths and Monsters
episodes.overview: An ominous discovery puts Boyd and his trusted circle on high alert; Julie searches for a way to harness her newfound abilities and Sara is once again tortured by the voices in her head.

episodes.name: What a Long Strange Trip It's Been
episodes.overview: Boyd and Jade set off on a desperate, mind-bending search for answers, while a food run to the settlement takes a chilling turn.

episodes.name: The Heart Is a Lonely Hunter
episodes.overview: Boyd and Jade find themselves at odds over whether or not they can trust the knowledge in Jade's head; deeply troubling news from the settlement makes its way back to town.

episodes.name: Best Laid Plans
episodes.overview: As Tabitha and Jade’s troubling history is brought to light, things begin to unravel for another resident in town. Boyd wants to test a dangerous theory.

episodes.name: Heavy Is the Head
episodes.overview: A dangerous plan begins to take shape. How much is Boyd willing to risk for the chance to get everyone home?  Fatima and Henry find themselves at two very different and disturbing crossroads.  Victor helps Tabitha and Ethan prepare for the worst.

episodes.name: The Calm Before
episodes.overview: The residents of town stand at a crossroads unlike any they’ve faced before as Boyd sets a daring, and dangerous, plan in motion.

episodes.name: If a Tree Falls in the Forest…
episodes.overview: Boyd’s quest to lead the residents home reaches a terrifying crossroads, and nothing will ever be the same again.

seasons.name: Season 4
seasons.overview: The closer the town residents get to the answers they seek, the more terrifying their search becomes. Who is the Man in Yellow, and what does he want? Will Jade and Tabitha’s revelation be the key to finally going home? How much longer can Boyd hold the town together, even as his body and mind are falling apart? And what role will the town’s most recent arrival play in the events to come? Season Four will open doors that some in town will end up wishing had remained closed.

alternativeTitles.title: フロム 閉ざされた街

reviews.author: Ahmad
reviews.content:
As a fan of “Lost,” I was intrigued when I heard that some of the same people were involved in the new EPIX series “From.” Unfortunately, the show doesn’t live up to the expectations set by “Lost.” While it starts off incredibly promising and has a unique feel, the lazy writing and subpar acting hold it back as the season progresses.

The unforgiving gore and genuine horror element that the show first offers are among its most distinctive features, but even these begin to wear thin as the season progresses. By the time I finished the first season, I couldn’t help but feel underwhelmed.

Although a second season is in the works, “From” barely does enough to keep me returning for more. I would probably tell my past self not to watch it if I could go back in time.

Even though I’m drawn in by the mystery, I’m worried about the show’s future. The writing is reminiscent of J.J. Abrams; the writers are adding mysteries at whim with no idea how to resolve them. Intriguing at first, but the poor writing soon began to sour the experience.

If you enjoy mysteries, you might want to give “From” a shot, but be aware that it features subpar acting and a superfluous plot that will make you lament the wasted opportunities. It’s far from bad, but it’s also not particularly noteworthy given the calibre of television we’ve been spoilt by in 2022.
___
[From] - Season One: 6.6/10 (Fair)

reviews.author: Alex
reviews.content: A solid 10/10 series from a storytelling perspective. Honestly, the trailer didn't attract me that much, but I decided to give it a chance, and after the first 3 episodes, I couldn't stay away from this show. What fascinated me the most was the people behind this series because the story is exceptional; I found myself deeply engaged with the characters, trying to find an escape route along with them. I quickly finished the first two seasons, and now I have to wait for season 3, but I can't wait for it to come out. I have an idea of how the next season could be based on the ending of season 2, but my mind is not as brilliant as the minds of the people who created this show. If you enjoy series that make you think and deliver a guaranteed outcome for you, only to completely change the situation and leave you in suspense and mystery, then this is a great show to watch.

reviews.author: JasAce
reviews.content:
**_No Spoilers_**

Knowing some of the same people involved with LOST were working on this is what got me to watch it. First season there were definitely more questions than answers but that's not a bad thing. It keeps you wondering what's going to happen next and how the heck at they going to get out.

I think the current 3rd seasons has really upped the game with a story line on the 'outside' and inside which gets you thinking how it's all connected. Season 3 also seems to take some pretty big steps in answering some questions we've had in the back of our minds for the first 2 seasons. I hope they learned their lesson from LOST and don't let it drag on like that and wrap up the story in 5 seasons, 6 max. 

**I highly recommend** it for anyone who enjoys a good mystery/drama but the horror aspects might be a little much for some. Even though it does add to the suspense and terror knowing you might lose a character at any moment who you've been rooting for or just enjoying their storyline so far.

reviews.author: fanfanfw
reviews.content:
The story follows a group of people trapped in a mysterious town that no one can escape, where terrifying creatures emerge at night. What makes From stand out is its ability to build a constant sense of dread without relying too heavily on jump scares. Instead, it focuses on atmosphere, character development, and the slow unraveling of the town’s secrets.

The performances are solid, especially from the lead characters who portray fear, confusion, and desperation in a believable way. The pacing can feel slow at times, but it helps deepen the mystery and keeps viewers engaged with unanswered questions. Overall, From is an intriguing watch for fans of suspenseful horror with layered storytelling and an eerie, unsettling tone.

reviews.author: Jim-Lahey
reviews.content:
Literally one of the dumbest shows I've ever had to see. Completely aimed at stupid gullible people. 

If you're continuing to watch this slop you're either unemployed or a complete moron. Actually I'd bet my next mortgage payment you're both.

reviews.author: mrs_tnchva
reviews.content: I hate Tabitha's character. I find her doing and saying stupid things. I also have a problem with the bottle tree. I remember Victor saying this tree is special because it leads you to the lighthouse, but when Dale entered the tree, he ended up stuck on a wall and died. That didn't make sense. Anyone who enters that tree should've gone to the tower, not somewhere different. Even if they are able to get to the tower, they wouldn't know what to do next so they won't get away anyway, unless they jumped from the tower, or maybe they need to be pushed by the boy in white for them to go home. Who knows what are the requirements! But they shouldn't have changed that fact just so no one can go home and continue the story.
